cards.title: Create a Parenting Rota That Actually Works
cards.body: A couple developed a simple system to fairly divide parenting tasks and household responsibilities. The approach helped reduce conflict and overwhelming feelings after their second child was born.

cards.title: Dealing With a Cruel Partner's Parent
cards.body: When a partner's parent is unkind, it's reasonable to limit their contact with future children. Setting boundaries now protects your family's wellbeing.

cards.title: Break Unhealthy Parental Enmeshment Patterns
cards.body: Not all parental attachment is healthy—unhealthy dependence shows specific warning signs. Learning to recognize and break these bonds is essential for adult independence.

cards.title: Child Neglect's Devastating Impact on Self-Esteem
cards.body: Child neglect causes greater severity of depression than physical or sexual abuse, though it's less studied. Understanding this helps parents recognize harm they may inadvertently cause.

cards.title: Protect Teens From Achievement Burnout
cards.body: High-achieving teen girls need family support to dream big without burning out. Practical shifts at home can protect mental health while encouraging ambition.

cards.title: AI's Hidden Risk to Developing Children
cards.body: AI creates an illusion of knowing users, which is harmless for adults but problematic for children still forming their identity. Parents should be aware of this psychological effect.

cards.title: How Childhood Trauma Shapes Adult Relationships
cards.body: Relationship patterns learned in childhood often repeat into adulthood, sometimes perpetuating dysfunction. Breaking these cycles requires awareness and intentional change.

cards.title: Parental Love Doesn't Always Prevent Neglect
cards.body: Neglect can grow from love, sacrifice, and survival—not just cruelty. Understanding this complexity helps parents recognize their own blind spots.

cards.title: Dangers in Unregulated Baby Sleep Industry
cards.body: Many baby sleep consultants lack proper qualifications and training despite caring for vulnerable children. Families need clarity about who they're trusting with their infants.

cards.title: UK Bans Explicit Images on Children's Phones
cards.body: The government is requiring tech firms to block naked images on devices used by children. This policy aims to protect young people from exposure to explicit content.
